name: apple-use
description: Single-install Codex plugin for Apple Notes, Reminders, and Mail on macOS with a local MCP server and canonical Apple skills.

interface.shortDescription: Local Apple Notes, Reminders, and Mail tools for Codex
interface.longDescription: Packages the canonical apple-use workflows into one Codex-local plugin. Installs an MCP server for Apple Notes, Reminders, Mail, and environment doctor checks while preserving the underlying skill documentation and local-first safety model.
defaultPrompt: Run the Apple Use doctor and summarize the local Apple toolchain status
Use local Apple tools to search Mail, inspect reminders, or work with notes
Draft an email in Mail.app and only send it after explicit confirmation
